title: Capability Manifest
description: Every capability in the registry must conform to this schema.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in consent dialogs and logs.

estimated_cost.description: Normalized resource cost estimate [0, 1] for the Resource Governor.

supports_rollback.description: If false, this action gets Level-4-style explicit confirmation regardless of declared level.

rollback_action.description: Tool name to call to undo this action. Required when supports_rollback=true.

params_schema.description: JSON Schema fragment for accepted params. Used by the Action Validation Layer.
